content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "看公告",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你看，這裡有公告。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ kàn, zhèlǐ yǒu gōnggào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 kan4, zhe4li3 you3 gong1gao4.",
          "translation_en": "Look, there's a notice here.",
          "translation_ko": "보세요, 여기에 공지가 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "上面寫什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Shàngmiàn xiě shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Shang4mian4 xie3 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "What does it say?",
          "translation_ko": "뭐라고 쓰여 있어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "說圖書館開放時間有改變。",
          "pinyin": "Shuō túshūguǎn kāifàng shíjiān yǒu gǎibiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Shuo1 tu2shu1guan3 kai1fang4 shi2jian1 you3 gai3bian4.",
          "translation_en": "It says the library's opening hours have changed.",
          "translation_ko": "도서관 운영 시간이 변경되었다고 해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "改成什麼時候？",
          "pinyin": "Gǎi chéng shénme shíhou?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Gai3 cheng2 shen2me shi2hou?",
          "translation_en": "Changed to what time?",
          "translation_ko": "언제로 바뀌었어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "從早上九點到下午五點。",
          "pinyin": "Cóng zǎoshang jiǔ diǎn dào xiàwǔ wǔ diǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Cong2 zao3shang jiu3 dian3 dao4 xia4wu3 wu3 dian3.",
          "translation_en": "From 9 AM to 5 PM.",
          "translation_ko": "오전 9시부터 오후 5시까지예요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好的，我知道了。謝謝你告訴我。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ zhīdào le. Xièxiè nǐ gàosu wǒ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, wo3 zhi1dao4 le. Xie4xie4 ni3 gao4su wo3.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I see. Thank you for telling me.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 알겠어요. 알려줘서 고마워요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What changed at the library?",
          "question_ko": "도서관에서 무엇이 변경되었습니까?",
          "options_en": ["The location", "The opening hours", "The name"],
          "options_ko": ["위치", "운영 시간", "이름"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of the numbers and the question intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell me about a notice you saw recently. What did it say?"
    },
    {
      "title": "問標示",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不好意思，請問這個標示是什麼意思？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, qǐngwèn zhège biāoshì shì shénme yìsi?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3 yi4si, qing3wen4 zhe4ge biao1shi4 shi4 shen2me yi4si?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, what does this sign mean?",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 이 표시가 무슨 뜻인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "那個是禁止吸菸的標示。",
          "pinyin": "Nàge shì jìnzhǐ xīyān de biāoshì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4ge shi4 jin4zhi3 xi1yan1 de biao1shi4.",
          "translation_en": "That's a no smoking sign.",
          "translation_ko": "그것은 금연 표시입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "所以這裡不能抽菸，對嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Suǒyǐ zhèlǐ bù néng chōuyān, duì ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Suo3yi3 zhe4li3 bu4 neng2 chou1yan1, dui4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "So you can't smoke here, right?",
          "translation_ko": "그러면 여기서 담배를 피울 수 없네요, 맞죠?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "對，請遵守規定。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, qǐng zūnshǒu guīdìng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, qing3 zun1shou3 gui1ding4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, please follow the rules.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 규정을 지켜 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好的，我知道了。謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ zhīdào le. Xièxiè.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, wo3 zhi1dao4 le. Xie4xie4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I understand. Thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 알겠습니다. 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What does the sign mean?",
          "question_ko": "표시는 무슨 뜻인가요?",
          "options_en": ["No smoking", "No eating", "No parking"],
          "options_ko": ["금연", "금식", "주차 금지"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, paying attention to the polite tone and the question at the end.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Describe a sign you saw today. What did it say and where was it?"
    },
    {
      "title": "了解規則",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你看這個海報，上面說要填寫表格。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ kàn zhège hǎibào, shàngmiàn shuō yào tiánxiě biǎogé.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 kan4 zhe4ge hai3bao4, shang4mian4 shuo1 yao4 tian2xie3 biao3ge2.",
          "translation_en": "Look at this poster, it says you need to fill out a form.",
          "translation_ko": "이 포스터를 보세요, 신청서를 작성해야 한다고 해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "然後呢？還要做什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Ránhòu ne? Hái yào zuò shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ran2hou4 ne? Hai2 yao4 zuo4 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "And then? What else do you need to do?",
          "translation_ko": "그다음에는요? 또 뭘 해야 하나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "還要簽名，然後交給櫃台。",
          "pinyin": "Hái yào qiānmíng, ránhòu jiāo gěi guìtái.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hai2 yao4 qian1ming2, ran2hou4 jiao1 gei3 gui4tai2.",
          "translation_en": "You also need to sign it, then hand it to the counter.",
          "translation_ko": "서명도 해야 하고, 그다음에 카운터에 제출해야 해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好的，我了解了。謝謝你的說明。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ liǎojiě le. Xièxiè nǐ de shuōmíng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, wo3 liao3jie3 le. Xie4xie4 ni3 de shuo1ming2.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I understand. Thank you for the explanation.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 이해했어요. 설명해줘서 고마워요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "不客氣。",
          "pinyin": "Bú kèqì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu2 ke4qi4.",
          "translation_en": "You're welcome.",
          "translation_ko": "천만에요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What do you need to do after filling out the form?",
          "question_ko": "신청서를 작성한 후에 무엇을 해야 합니까?",
          "options_en": ["Sign it and hand it to the counter", "Mail it", "Keep it"],
          "options_ko": ["서명하고 카운터에 제출", "우편으로 보내기", "보관하기"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the sequence words like '然後' and '還要'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell me about a rule you had to follow recently. How did you learn about it?"
    }
  ]
}
